title: The Ethereum Hard Fork: Origin of ETH and ETC
description: A timeline showing the key event that led to the creation of two separate currencies, Ethereum (ETH) and Ethereum Classic (ETC).
relationships: The DAO Hack triggered a community debate
The community decision to implement a Hard Fork created a chain split
ETH continued on the new forked chain with reversed transactions
ETC continued on the original immutable chain preserving the hack
